## Public Surface

- [ ] README, docs, or CHANGELOG are updated when public behavior changed.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private URLs, terminal transcripts, or local machine paths are included.
- [ ] New scripts needed by `package.json` are committed and not ignored by `.gitignore`.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run check:docs-public`
- [ ] `npm run check:public-release:ci`
